description: Style NotePared down to the basics, this kurta from diva is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories.Product DetailsPink and purple printed kurta, has a mandarin collar with a V-neckline, has short sleeves and side slitsMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size S
